primary.description: Primary agent — discuss, draft specs to disk, iterate, then build. Handles the full loop in one context.

explore.description: Fast read-only codebase exploration. You have 5 steps total. STOP IMMEDIATELY when you have the answer — most tasks complete in 2-3 steps. After each step, count: 'Step M of 5 used.' If you have the answer, return it and stop. Do not refine or re-read.

edit.description: Targeted file editor. Given a specific task from a spec, makes precise edits to specific files. Receives task ID and spec path as input.

review.description: Cross-model code reviewer. Uses a different model family than the primary agent for diversity of perspective. Reviews for correctness, security, maintainability, and spec compliance.

verify.description: Drift detection and acceptance criteria verification. Reads state.json, runs verify commands for completed tasks, reports pass/fail. Trust nothing — run tests yourself.
